debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : ↑p ≤ √↑(Erdos392.Params.n P)
⊢ ↑(Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p) ≤
    ↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P)

failed_attempts:
-- The original statement `balance p ≤ M * Real.log n` is FALSE.
-- Counterexample: n=130, M=65, L=1, p=2 gives balance=327 > 325 ≥ 65·ln(130).
-- The correct bound is `M * Nat.log p n` (equivalently, M * ⌊log_p(n)⌋).
-- This is because each of the (at most Nat.log p n) prime-power levels p^k
-- contributes at most M excess to the balance, using count_bound_aux.
/-
@[blueprint
  "initial-factorization-small-prime-le"
  (statement := /-- A small prime $p \leq \sqrt{n}$ can be in surplus by at most $M\log n$.-/)
  (proof := /-- Routine computation using Legendre's formula.-/)]
theorem Params.initial.balance_small_prime_le (P : Params) {p : ℕ} (hp : p ≤ Real.sqrt P.n) :
    P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M * (Real.log P.n) := by sorry
-/

/-- A small prime $p \leq \sqrt{n}$ can be in surplus by at most $M \cdot \lfloor\log_p n\rfloor$.

The original statement had bound `M * Real.log n` (natural logarithm), but this is false:
for n=130, M=65, L=1, p=2 the balance is 327 > 325 ≥ 65·ln(130).
The corrected bound uses `Nat.log p n = ⌊log_p(n)⌋` instead. Note that for p ≥ 3,
`Nat.log p n ≤ Real.log n` (since `ln(p) > 1`), so this is a strengthening for p ≥ 3.
For p = 2, this gives the weaker but correct bound `M * ⌊log₂(n)⌋`.

For downstream use in the score calculation, the product
`balance(p) * log(p) ≤ M * Nat.log p n * log(p) ≤ M * log(n)` still gives the
needed bound `M * log(n)` per prime. -/

private lemma mul_div_nested_le' (n M d : ℕ) : M * (n / M / d) ≤ n / d := by
  by_cases hM : M = 0 <;> by_cases hd : d = 0 <;> simp_all +decide [ Nat.div_div_eq_div_mul ];
  rw [ Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le ( Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hd ) ] ; nlinarith [ Nat.div_mul_le_self n ( M * d ) ] ;

private lemma count_bound_general' (n M d : ℕ) (hd : d > 0) :
    M * ((n / M + d - 1) / d) ≤ n / d + M := by
  have h_ceil_le : (n / M + d - 1) / d ≤ n / M / d + 1 := by
    rw [Nat.lt_succ_iff.symm]
    apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul
    have h1 := Nat.div_add_mod (n / M) d
    have h2 := Nat.mod_lt (n / M) hd
    nlinarith [Nat.sub_add_cancel (show 1 ≤ n / M + d from by omega)]
  calc M * ((n / M + d - 1) / d)
      ≤ M * (n / M / d + 1) := Nat.mul_le_mul_left M h_ceil_le
    _ = M * (n / M / d) + M := by ring
    _ ≤ n / d + M := by linarith [mul_div_nested_le' n M d]

theorem Params.initial.balance_small_prime_le (P : Params) {p : ℕ} (hp : (p : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n) :
    P.initial.balance p ≤ P.M * (Nat.log p P.n) := by
  by_cases h : Nat.Prime p <;> simp_all +decide [ Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum ]
  · have h_sum_le : (Multiset.map (fun x => (Nat.factorization x) p) P.initial.a).sum ≤ P.M * (Finset.sum (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) (fun m => (Nat.factorization m) p)) := by
      have h_sum_le : (Multiset.map (fun x => (Nat.factorization x) p) P.initial.a).sum ≤ (Multiset.map (fun x => (Nat.factorization x) p) (Multiset.join (Multiset.replicate P.M (Multiset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)))).sum := by
        have h_filter : P.initial.a ≤ (replicate P.M (.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).join := by
          exact Multiset.filter_le _ _
        exact Multiset.le_iff_exists_add.mp h_filter |> fun ⟨ x, hx ⟩ => by simp +decide [ hx ]
      convert h_sum_le using 1 ; simp +decide [ mul_comm ] ; ring
      exact Or.inl rfl
    have h_count_bound : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.log p P.n), (Finset.filter (fun m => p^k ∣ m) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card ≤ (P.n / P.M + p^k - 1) / p^k := by
      intro k hk
      have h_count_bound : (Finset.filter (fun m => p^k ∣ m) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card ≤ (P.n / P.M + p^k - 1) / p^k := by
        have h_filter : Finset.filter (fun m => p^k ∣ m) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) ⊆ Finset.image (fun m => p^k * m) (Finset.Ico ((P.n - P.n / P.M + p^k - 1) / p^k) ((P.n + p^k - 1) / p^k)) := by
          intro m hm; simp_all +decide [ Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero ]
          refine' ⟨ m / p ^ k, ⟨ _, _ ⟩, Nat.mul_div_cancel' <| Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero hm.2 ⟩
          · rw [ Nat.div_le_iff_le_mul_add_pred ] <;> norm_num [ h.pos ]
            linarith [ Nat.mod_add_div m ( p ^ k ), Nat.sub_add_cancel ( Nat.one_le_pow k p h.pos ), Nat.sub_add_cancel ( show P.n / P.M ≤ P.n from Nat.div_le_self _ _ ) ]
          · rw [ Nat.lt_iff_add_one_le, Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le ( pow_pos h.pos _ ) ]
            exact le_tsub_of_add_le_left ( by linarith [ Nat.mod_add_div m ( p ^ k ), Nat.sub_add_cancel ( Nat.one_le_pow k p h.pos ) ] )
        refine le_trans ( Finset.card_le_card h_filter ) ?_
        rw [ Finset.card_image_of_injective _ fun x y hxy => mul_left_cancel₀ ( pow_ne_zero _ h.ne_zero ) hxy ] ; norm_num
        rw [ ← Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ ( pow_pos h.pos _ ) ]
        gcongr
        rw [ tsub_le_iff_right ]
        linarith [ Nat.div_add_mod ( P.n - P.n / P.M + p ^ k - 1 ) ( p ^ k ), Nat.mod_lt ( P.n - P.n / P.M + p ^ k - 1 ) ( pow_pos h.pos k ), Nat.sub_add_cancel ( show 1 ≤ P.n / P.M + p ^ k from Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr <| by aesop ), Nat.sub_add_cancel ( show 1 ≤ P.n - P.n / P.M + p ^ k from Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr <| by aesop ), Nat.sub_add_cancel ( show P.n / P.M ≤ P.n from Nat.div_le_self _ _ ) ]
      exact h_count_bound
    have h_sum_bound : P.M * (Finset.sum (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) (fun m => (Nat.factorization m) p)) ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.log p P.n), (P.n / p^k + P.M) := by
      have h_sum_bound : P.M * (Finset.sum (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n) (fun m => (Nat.factorization m) p)) ≤ P.M * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.log p P.n), (Finset.filter (fun m => p^k ∣ m) (Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n)).card) := by
        have h_sum_bound : ∀ m ∈ Finset.Ico (P.n - P.n / P.M) P.n, (Nat.factorization m) p ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.log p P.n), (if p^k ∣ m then 1 else 0) := by
          intro m hm; by_cases hm' : m = 0 <;> simp_all +decide [ Nat.factorization_eq_zero_iff ]
          refine' le_trans _ ( Finset.card_mono <| show Finset.Icc 1 ( m.factorization p ) ⊆ Finset.filter ( fun x => p ^ x ∣ m ) ( Finset.Icc 1 ( Nat.log p P.n ) ) from fun x hx => Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨ Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨ by linarith [ Finset.mem_Icc.mp hx ], by linarith [ Finset.mem_Icc.mp hx, Nat.le_log_of_pow_le h.one_lt <| show p ^ ( m.factorization p ) ≤ P.n from le_trans ( Nat.le_of_dvd ( Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hm' ) <| Nat.ordProj_dvd _ _ ) hm.2.le ] ⟩, Nat.dvd_trans ( pow_dvd_pow _ <| Finset.mem_Icc.mp hx |>.2 ) <| Nat.ordProj_dvd _ _ ⟩ ) ; aesop
        refine' Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ( le_trans ( Finset.sum_le_sum h_sum_bound ) _ )
        rw [ Finset.sum_comm ] ; simp +decide [ Finset.sum_ite ]
      refine le_trans h_sum_bound ?_
      rw [ Finset.mul_sum _ _ _ ]
      refine Finset.sum_le_sum fun k hk => le_trans ( Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ( h_count_bound k hk ) ) ?_
      convert count_bound_general' P.n P.M ( p ^ k ) ( pow_pos h.pos _ ) using 1
    have h_legendre : (Nat.factorization (Nat.factorial P.n)) p = ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.log p P.n), (P.n / p^k) := by
      rw [ Nat.factorization_def ]
      · haveI := Fact.mk h; rw [ padicValNat_factorial ] ; aesop
        norm_num
      · assumption
    convert Int.ofNat_le.mpr ( h_sum_le.trans h_sum_bound ) using 1 ; norm_num [ Finset.sum_add_distrib, h_legendre ] ; ring
    simp +decide [ Finset.sum_add_distrib, h_legendre ] ; ring
  · positivity
